title: The Below Bedrock Caves
description: A Fabric mod that adds in a mining dimension.
body:
# What is it?

The Below Bedrock Caves is a mod that is centered around a dimension that has much more ores than the overworld.

It is a mining dimension, essentially.

# Ore Support
- Powah! (Rearchitected)
- TechReborn
- Create
- Vanilla MC


# Future Features / Versions
- Ad Astra ores
- Modern Industrialization ores
- XP drops for certain ores

# Some useful links...
1. [Wiki](https://chacepratt.github.io/wikis/tbbc/index.html)
2. [TBBC GitHub](https://github.com/ChacePratt/BelowBedrockCaves)
3. [My website](https://chacepratt.github.io)


# Credits
Thanks to the developers of FabricMC!  
[Custom Portal API](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/customportalapi)
